===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Roxie Marlon Adventures.png|220px|thumb|Marlon in [[Pokémon Adventures]]]]
====History====
====={{MangaArc|Black & White}}=====
Marlon debuted in ''[[PS512|Hallway Hijinks]]'', where he participated as a competitor in the {{un|Pokémon League}}. After battling his way through Victory Road, he eventually made it into the top 8. In ''[[PS514|The Tournament Continues]]'', Marlon faced [[Colress|Hood Man]] in the quarterfinals. Despite managing to disable the moves of Hood Man's {{p|Beheeyem}}, Marlon ended up losing, allowing Hood Man to advance to the next round.

In ''[[PS517|Something Suspicious]]'', Marlon attempted to head back home, only to be approached by {{adv|White}}. When asked on what he knew about Hood Man, Marlon revealed his opponent had managed to somehow enter the League without collecting a single Gym [[Badge]]. White decided to expose Hood Man for cheating, but was stopped by Marlon, who was perfectly fine with losing since his opponent was a strong {{pkmn|Trainer}}. Marlon stated that he found {{adv|Cheren}} more suspicious and suggested that White begin investigating him next.

====={{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}=====
Sometime before the events of the {{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}, Marlon became the [[Gym Leader]] of [[Humilau City]]. In ''[[PS541|Pink Slip]]'', Marlon and [[Benga]] helped rescue Cheren's class and [[Roxie]] from [[Castelia City]], which had been frozen by the [[Plasma Frigate]]. After explaining the situation, Marlon and Began asked Cheren and Roxie to join them and launch a counterattack against [[Team Plasma]].
{{-}}

|desc={{p|Jellicent}} is Marlon's only known Pokémon. He has been with Marlon ever since he was a {{p|Frillish}}. Marlon used him to battle Hood Man's {{p|Beheeyem}} at the Unova Pokémon League. Although he put up a good fight, Beheeyem defeated him with {{m|Shadow Ball}}, giving Hood Man the victory. Later, he was healed by White's {{p|Alomomola}}, Nancy, in an attempt to get Marlon's trust.

Jellicent's known moves are {{m|Scald}} and {{m|Recover}}, and his Ability is {{a|Cursed Body}}.}}

Marlon has at least two other Pokémon, as he participated in the quarterfinals of the Unova Pokémon League, which requires a Single Battle involving three Pokémon.
